EmitterFix

Doc ID 0417_WOS_EmitterFix_v1.0.0
Date 2026-04-17
Version 1.0.0
System WOS
Domain wall
Component emitter_system
Type legacy-spec
Priority medium
Risk unknown
Status needs-review

Summary: Imported legacy Wall of Sound spec. Needs review.

0417_WOS_EmitterFix_v1.0.0

Date: 04/17 Project: Wall of Sound Engine Scope: Fix emitter audio dispatch, ball spawning, BPM reference, and duplicate function conflict

Assumptions

  • Environment: Browser (Canvas + WebAudio + MIDI)
  • Engine namespace: SBE
  • Main file: initMain (this file)
  • Event system expects: eventBus.triggerEvent(type, { sound: {…} })

Fix 1 — Emitter Audio Dispatch (CRITICAL)

Replace: dispatchCollisionEvent(line.sound);

With: dispatchCollisionEvent({ sound: line.sound });

Replace: dispatchCollisionEvent(seg.sound);

With: dispatchCollisionEvent({ sound: seg.sound });

Fix 2 — Ball Spawn Count Bug (CRITICAL)

Replace: const count = ball.hitCount || 0;

With: const count = clampInt(state.ballTool.count, 1, 8);

Fix 3 — Duplicate clearBalls Function

DELETE: function clearBalls(state) { state.balls.length = 0; }

KEEP: function clearBalls() { state.balls = []; }

Fix 4 — Incorrect BPM Reference

Replace: (60000 / (state.transport.bpm || 120))

With: (60000 / (state.bpm || 120))

Fix 5 — Safe Event Dispatch Guard

Update dispatchCollisionEvent:

function dispatchCollisionEvent(sourceObject) { if (!sourceObject || !sourceObject.sound) return;

if (sourceObject.isMuted) return;

if ( sourceObject.behavior && sourceObject.behavior.emitterConfig && sourceObject.behavior.emitterConfig.isMuted ) return;

const currentTime = getTransportTime();

if (!state.quantize.enabled) { eventBus.triggerEvent(“collision”, sourceObject); recordLoopEvent(sourceObject, currentTime); return; }

const gridTime = getQuantizeGridTime(); const nextTime = Math.ceil(currentTime / gridTime) * gridTime;

state.quantizeQueue.push({ time: nextTime, sourceObject: sourceObject, }); }

Implementation Guide

  • Where: emitter functions + dispatchCollisionEvent
  • Run: reload app and test emitters
  • Expect: working audio + correct spawning

Wall of Sound

Shared project memory for the StudioRich audio/visual system. Specs, logs, recovery notes, and local portals live here.
